_comment: Source: Michigan MDHHS Section 8-11 Immunization and Testing (Revised 12/27/2022, MDHHS Reviewed 2022). Base Michigan template — MCA-specific selections not configured.
protocol_reference: Michigan System Protocol Section 8-11: Immunization and Testing — MDHHS Approved 12/27/2022
purpose: Govern EMS provider immunization requirements and baseline testing as a component of a comprehensive infection control program. Current immunizations reduce risk of occupational communicable disease exposure. MCAs and EMS employers are responsible for implementing immunization and testing programs.

sections.title: Recommended Immunizations for EMS Providers
points: Hepatitis B: complete series (3-dose); verify immunity via post-vaccination serology (anti-HBs ≥ 10 mIU/mL)
Tetanus/Diphtheria/Pertussis (Tdap): one-time Tdap booster; Td every 10 years thereafter
MMR (Measles, Mumps, Rubella): two-dose series or documented immunity
Varicella: two-dose series or documented immunity or prior disease
COVID-19: current CDC-recommended series per CDC guidance
Meningococcal: at discretion of MCA/employer based on risk assessment

sections.title: Tuberculosis (TB) Testing
points: Baseline TB testing at hire: two-step tuberculin skin test (TST) OR IGRA (Interferon-Gamma Release Assay)
Annual TB testing recommended for EMS providers per CDC and OSHA guidelines
Positive baseline or annual TB test: follow-up with occupational health or treating physician per MCA protocol
Active TB disease: provider removed from patient contact until cleared by treating physician

sections.title: MCA/Employer Responsibilities
points: MCAs and EMS employers must maintain records of provider immunization status and testing
MCAs must have a process for addressing providers who decline recommended immunizations
MCAs must provide access to recommended immunizations and post-exposure testing as part of occupational health program
Declinations: providers who decline recommended immunizations must be educated on the risks and sign a declination form per OSHA Bloodborne Pathogen Standard

scope_notes: Recommended immunizations: Hepatitis B (verify immunity), Influenza (annual), Tdap, MMR, Varicella, COVID-19
TB testing: baseline two-step TST or IGRA at hire; annual testing recommended
Positive TB test: follow-up with occupational health
Declinations: education + signed declination form per OSHA requirements
